docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: F. RAYRAY. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).
